rootCause: Quest completable tests modeled item availability as monotonic and missed order-sensitive soft-locks where a sibling quest can consume a gate item needed by another still-unlocked quest.
resolution: Linearized Completionist progression so destructive transform steps come after cataloging, updated the display gate to avoid requiring the pre-transform item at quest start, and added regression coverage for sibling-branch consumable soft-lock detection plus completionist-specific linearity checks.
